name: Advanced HipTwists
notes:
Alternative finishing positions:
Open Position: Man turn 3/8 to L over steps 5 and 6.
Open CPP
Contact Position: use normal hold.
Man turn 1/2 to L over steps 5 and 6 to end RF to side and slightly fwd.
Lady: 3/4 to L over steps 5 and 6 to end LF behind RF as Cuban Cross.
Man can use "Press Line" on step 1 by making a slight swivel to R on RF and placing LF fwd on ball of foot with pressure but with partial weight.
This can be danced following Alemana with R to R hand hold, changing to L to R hand hold on step 5 of this figure.

steps.action: Forward in RSP, slight body turn to R
comments: Increase tone and lower L arm to R at chest level. Widen R arm in h old to R side.

steps.action: Cuban Cross behind RF, 1/8 turn left
comments: Retain tone and return arms to normal position, slightly to R. This is Pressed Backward Walk.

steps.action: Back in RSP, 1/2 turn to R
comments:
Turn starts end of previous beat. Sharp 1/2 turn R, 2 options to finish (personal preference):
Option: after the turn, keep RF is in front, keep pressure on ball of RF, then quick release of RF, step back on count "2". Do not leave RF trailing during turn.
Option: during the quick turn, R toe/ball comes to the heel of LF, brushing/passing and quickly place back and then "melt" to R hip.

steps.action: RF forward in line with LF towards Man's R side
comments: Slightly extend L arm, L hand still.
